name: Turkey Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked turkey, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the turkey, half cup of enchilada sauce, green chilies, onion flakes, and cilantro.
2. Spoon 2 heaping tablespoons of the turkey mixture down the center of each tortilla.
3. Roll the tortillas into a jelly-roll style to encase the meat.
4. Spray a 2x9x12-inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Place the rolled tortillas, seam-side-down, in the dish.
6. Top the tortillas with the remaining enchilada sauce, onions, tomatoes, olives, and cheese.
7. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and bubbly.
